PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Continued To Nov-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel McLean, in person, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Mr. McLean of his attempts to hire an attorney and advises that no attorney is willing to assist him due to the value of the estate. The court lists some of the issues with this mater including, but not limited to, documents that he is required to file. The court points to the amount of work and detail involved with estate matters. The court advises Mr. McLean that there are some paralegals who may be able to assist him. The list of paralegals is printed and provided to him in court as is the phone number to the Bar Association of San Francisco's Lawyer referral service.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Nov-09-2022 at 9:00 am.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
